bead.title: probe reasoning CLI: add snapshot and deterministic matrix modes
bead.description:
Review of fizeau-d72b32a0 found the probe CLI is weaker than the current ADR-010/runbook intent: no introspection snapshot mode, no separate snapshot-only or matrix-only modes, no seed control, and the trivial 2+2 prompt produced misleading OR-Qwen classification evidence.

In scope:
- cmd/fizeau-probe-reasoning CLI flags and tests
- deterministic probe prompt/seed handling where supported
- saved introspection snapshot output suitable for docs/research artifacts

Out of scope:
- Fixing OR-Qwen catalog wire form; separate reopened bead.
bead.acceptance:
1. go test ./cmd/fizeau-probe-reasoning/... -run "Test.*Snapshot|Test.*Matrix|Test.*Seed|Test.*Deterministic" -count=1 passes.
2. cmd/fizeau-probe-reasoning supports snapshot-only and matrix-only modes documented in its help output.
3. A fixture test proves generated artifacts include an introspection snapshot plus request/response matrix outputs without requiring a live provider.
